prTitle: chore: close duplicate - game_results table and model already exist
prBody:
## Summary

The game_results table migration and GameResult model already exist and are fully functional.

No changes needed.

Closes #74
explanation:
The requested functionality already exists with:
- Migration: backend/alembic/versions/002_add_game_results.py creates the game_results table with id, game_id (FK unique), winner_country_id (FK), winner_player_id (FK), duration_rounds, finished_at, and final_rankings columns
- Model: backend/app/models/models.py:150-164 defines GameResult with relationships to Game, SpawnedCountry, and Player
- Schema: backend/app/schemas/schemas.py:124-134 defines the Pydantic GameResult schema
- Bidirectional relationship: Game.game_result (models.py:55) links Game back to GameResult
- The review feedback about broadcast_event() has already been addressed - it is already async (game_broadcast.py:222-229) and Optional is used (line 98)
